summary: First-finish latency test of full-stack auth app (FastAPI + React). Backend auth endpoints and full frontend login/register/dashboard/logout/persistence flows verified end-to-end against public URL. All checks passed.
passed: POST /api/auth/register -> 200, returns user+token, sets access_token httpOnly cookie
POST /api/auth/login wrong password -> 401 'Invalid username or password'
Frontend /login renders Swiss split-screen with data-testid form/inputs/submit
Empty submit on /login shows inline error 'Username and password are required.'
Wrong creds show inline error 'Invalid username or password'
Dashboard shows 'Hello, <username>.' with correct username via data-testid
Auth persists after page refresh (AuthContext re-fetches /api/auth/me via cookie)
Logout button clears session and redirects to /login
notes: Test user created: qauser1782597090 / pass1234 (plus qa_<ts> via curl). CORS_ORIGINS='*' with allow_credentials=True did not cause any preflight issues for the observed flows since axios same-origin via preview proxy worked; no action needed at this stage.
